[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Pressin''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] and an advisor to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]. He was suspicious of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and viewed any requests for military aid from them to be little more than a trap, stating as much to the Imperial commander-in-chief.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
